name: Lumos Networks Corp.
description: Lumos is a telecommunications company based in the United States that specializes in providing high-speed, 100% fiber-optic internet services to residential and business customers. Operating primarily in North Carolina, Virginia, and South Carolina, the company focuses on building transformational, future-ready network infrastructure. Lumos offers a range of digital solutions, including high-speed internet, VOIP telephone services, and advanced connectivity options. As part of a joint venture involving T-Mobile, the company is actively expanding its fiber footprint to deliver reliable, high-performance broadband connectivity to communities, aiming to bridge the digital divide with modern, scalable technology.
